## Meeting Purpose

[Divide work for strategy sprints and review content strategy process](https://fathom.video/share/zGosUvPrHhPJy9kzR_oUpxEdEs-TkCt5?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Process for content strategy: internal audit, external opportunities, keyword database creation, topic clustering, and assignment generation](https://fathom.video/share/zGosUvPrHhPJy9kzR_oUpxEdEs-TkCt5?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [Tailoring strategy depth to client size/maturity (e.g. Town.com vs Engine)](https://fathom.video/share/zGosUvPrHhPJy9kzR_oUpxEdEs-TkCt5?tab=summary&timestamp=28.0)
  - [Competitive research crucial for informing content strategy and providing client insights](https://fathom.video/share/zGosUvPrHhPJy9kzR_oUpxEdEs-TkCt5?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [Airtable for large datasets, Notion for client-facing presentations and smaller projects](https://fathom.video/share/zGosUvPrHhPJy9kzR_oUpxEdEs-TkCt5?tab=summary&timestamp=1567.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Process Overview

  - [Start with internal audit using SEMrush to analyze existing blog content](https://fathom.video/share/zGosUvPrHhPJy9kzR_oUpxEdEs-TkCt5?tab=summary&timestamp=107.0)
  - [Create keyword database in Airtable, importing CSVs from SEMrush exports](https://fathom.video/share/zGosUvPrHhPJy9kzR_oUpxEdEs-TkCt5?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [Find external opportunities by identifying relevant competitor sites](https://fathom.video/share/zGosUvPrHhPJy9kzR_oUpxEdEs-TkCt5?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [Use filters to narrow down keyword sets (e.g., keyword difficulty, search volume)](https://fathom.video/share/zGosUvPrHhPJy9kzR_oUpxEdEs-TkCt5?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [Enrich data with rollups, AI-generated descriptions, and difficulty levels](https://fathom.video/share/zGosUvPrHhPJy9kzR_oUpxEdEs-TkCt5?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
  - [Create topic clusters and assignments based on keyword data](https://fathom.video/share/zGosUvPrHhPJy9kzR_oUpxEdEs-TkCt5?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)
  - [Final output: assignments categorized by status, difficulty, and topic cluster](https://fathom.video/share/zGosUvPrHhPJy9kzR_oUpxEdEs-TkCt5?tab=summary&timestamp=1304.0)

### Tools and Workflow

  - [Airtable for large datasets (50,000+ keywords)](https://fathom.video/share/zGosUvPrHhPJy9kzR_oUpxEdEs-TkCt5?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [Notion for client-facing presentations and smaller projects](https://fathom.video/share/zGosUvPrHhPJy9kzR_oUpxEdEs-TkCt5?tab=summary&timestamp=1567.0)
  - [SEMrush for keyword research and competitor analysis](https://fathom.video/share/zGosUvPrHhPJy9kzR_oUpxEdEs-TkCt5?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)
  - [AI-powered assignment creation workflows (coming soon to internal system)](https://fathom.video/share/zGosUvPrHhPJy9kzR_oUpxEdEs-TkCt5?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)

### Client-Specific Approaches

  - [Town.com: Focus on 100-200 low-hanging fruit opportunities, avoid overwhelming](https://fathom.video/share/zGosUvPrHhPJy9kzR_oUpxEdEs-TkCt5?tab=summary&timestamp=2110.0)
  - [Engine: Demonstrate extensive opportunities to encourage scaling up](https://fathom.video/share/zGosUvPrHhPJy9kzR_oUpxEdEs-TkCt5?tab=summary&timestamp=2118.0)
  - [Tailor strategy depth to client maturity (e.g., Biologica as a new site needs higher quality focus)](https://fathom.video/share/zGosUvPrHhPJy9kzR_oUpxEdEs-TkCt5?tab=summary&timestamp=2137.0)

### Competitive Research

  - [Create database of competitors (direct and indirect)](https://fathom.video/share/zGosUvPrHhPJy9kzR_oUpxEdEs-TkCt5?tab=summary&timestamp=2447.0)
  - [Analyze traffic, page count, and relationship to client](https://fathom.video/share/zGosUvPrHhPJy9kzR_oUpxEdEs-TkCt5?tab=summary&timestamp=2454.0)
  - [Categorize competitors (e.g., behemoths, content-forward SaaS, niche players)](https://fathom.video/share/zGosUvPrHhPJy9kzR_oUpxEdEs-TkCt5?tab=summary&timestamp=2470.0)
  - [Identify 3 exemplary sites as potential inspiration for client's approach](https://fathom.video/share/zGosUvPrHhPJy9kzR_oUpxEdEs-TkCt5?tab=summary&timestamp=2509.0)

### Time Estimation

  - [Thorough content strategy development: 3-4 hours per client (with experience)](https://fathom.video/share/zGosUvPrHhPJy9kzR_oUpxEdEs-TkCt5?tab=summary&timestamp=2340.0)
  - [Initial attempts may take longer; efficiency improves with practice](https://fathom.video/share/zGosUvPrHhPJy9kzR_oUpxEdEs-TkCt5?tab=summary&timestamp=2358.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Start with Town.com strategy for Friday deadline](https://fathom.video/share/zGosUvPrHhPJy9kzR_oUpxEdEs-TkCt5?tab=summary&timestamp=2645.0)
  - [Check with George on Engine's competitive research status](https://fathom.video/share/zGosUvPrHhPJy9kzR_oUpxEdEs-TkCt5?tab=summary&timestamp=2650.0)
  - [Marisol and Sadira to collaborate on Notion documentation](https://fathom.video/share/zGosUvPrHhPJy9kzR_oUpxEdEs-TkCt5?tab=summary&timestamp=2389.0)
  - [Marcel to assign specific tasks for upcoming strategy sprints](https://fathom.video/share/zGosUvPrHhPJy9kzR_oUpxEdEs-TkCt5?tab=summary&timestamp=2627.0)
  - [Team to determine best practices for using Airtable vs Notion for different client sizes and data needs](https://fathom.video/share/zGosUvPrHhPJy9kzR_oUpxEdEs-TkCt5?tab=summary&timestamp=2578.0)
